Choose Your Way to Book

Two ways to work with us. Pick what fits your group.

Both include the shopping, the cooking, the service, and the cleanup — the difference is how the bill is built.

100% Customizable

Chef + Ingredients Cost

More control and flexibility — you build the menu, course by course, with the chef.

Select your number of guests to see your chef's fee and estimated ingredient cost.

1
1–8 guests · $200 USD chef's fee
Chef's Fee $200

Gratuity not included 😉

Ingredients average $15+ USD per person for a 4-course menu, billed at cost. Simpler menus (tacos, local fish) run closer to that starting point; premium picks like Wagyu, lamb, or lobster run higher — your final grocery cost depends on the menu you choose.

Just for inspiration — with this option you and the chef design your own menu together, course by course.

📅 Add to Google Calendar Reserve Now

Sending this holds your date. Within 24 hours we'll email your secure payment link to confirm your reservation. Once we receive your payment, your service is 100% confirmed — we'll then reach out to arrange the final details: exact location, day, time, allergies, and any special requests.

What Happens Next

From first message to the last bite.

How It Works

Contact us and tell us what you love — and what you don't. From there, we take care of everything: the shopping, cooking, presentation, service, and even the cleanup. All you need to do is relax, enjoy the food, and make the most of your time together.

What to Expect

We'll arrive about an hour and a half to two hours before your meal to begin preparations, fully equipped with fresh ingredients. Everything is cooked right in your kitchen — the aromas will fill the space and become part of the experience. We'll plate each dish with care, set the table, and serve your meal. Once you've finished, we'll leave your kitchen clean and tidy, so all you have to do is relax and enjoy the moment.

“
The Founder

Chef Lisandro Silva

Born in Mexico City and shaped by the world, Chef Silva has spent years traveling across cultures and kitchens — from the vibrant flavors of Latin America to the refined tables of Europe and the Pacific. Each destination has left a mark, inspiring the honest, soulful cuisine behind every menu on this page.

Educated in the art of fine dining and driven by a deep respect for local ingredients, Chef Silva has designed unforgettable private experiences for international guests — from Olympic athletes to Hollywood actors to chart-topping musicians — throughout his career.

Every menu is his — designed and refined under his direction, and brought to your table by our team of trusted chefs, so the same care and standard are there whether it's Chef Silva or one of his chefs behind the stove.

"Cooking has always been my way to connect — with people, with memories, and with the joy of sharing a great meal." — Chef Lisandro Silva, Founder
From the Farm

Our Food, Sourced Close to Home

Inspired by local flavors and crafted with care, our menus feature fresh ingredients — many sourced directly from Orchard Los Cabos, our own farm. Each dish is made to share and enjoy together.
